title: Tyler Celotta
text: Physics student at Reed College enrolled in a dual degree program with a strong background in mechanical engineering and hands-on experience in machining and design. Skilled in Python programming, data analysis, and fabrication, with leadership experience, a love of the outdoors, and an engaged member of the community as an Eagle Scout.

title: Tyler Celotta
text:
Education
Reed College, BA in Physics – Portland, OR | Jan 2024 – Present

Enrolled in 3/2 Dual Degree Program: BA Physics (Reed) + BS Mechanical Engineering (Columbia University)
Coursework: Calculus (I,II,III), Linear Algebra, Data Science, Physics, Chemistry, Logic, Humanities, Ethics, Economics
Earned credits from the University of Minnesota (Physics, English, Python)
Earned credits from the University of St.Thomas (Statistics)

title: Tyler Celotta
text:
Experience
Intern, Mechanical Engineering, Twin Cities Makers – Minneapolis, MN | Jun 2025 – Aug 2025 - Designed and implemented a 15-hour curriculum covering manual milling, lathe turning, and CNC programming. - Designed/built two-stage evaporative cooling prototype (ΔT = 5°F at 60% humidity). - Fabricated precision tools by hand (non-sparking propane regulator wrench, ± 0.003’’ tolerance). - Conducted mechanical maintenance on shop systems (plumbing, HVAC, machines) to improve equipment uptime. - Collaborated with shop members to brainstorm and troubleshoot project issues to help them move forward.
Engineering Job Shadow, Medtronic – Minneapolis, MN | Oct 2023 - Shadowed 6 biomedical engineers developing pacemaker systems; observed live surgery for procedural analysis. - Discussed testing and materials protocols for medical-grade components under NDA.
Grant Writer, Centennial School District – Lino Lakes, MN | Nov 2021 – March 2022 - Co-drafted proposal for diesel-to-electric bus fleet conversion. - Performed 30-year cost-benefit analysis with state data. - Created technical and economic modeling in Excel to demonstrate long-term energy savings.
Contracted Trip Leader – Portland, OR | Aug 2025 – Sep 2025
Lifeguard, City of Lino Lakes & Community Education ISD12 – Lino Lakes, MN | Jul 2022 – Aug 2023
Barista, Caribou Coffee – Moundsview, MN | Jun 2024 – Sept 2025
Van Driver, Reed College – Portland, OR | Aug 2024 – Present
Umpire, Centennial Little League – Lino Lakes, MN | Feb 2022 – Jul 2025
Portrait Photographer, Celotta Photos | April 2023 – Present

title: Tyler Celotta
text:
Skills

Programming: Python (data analysis, math modeling, and graphical analysis)
Data Tools: R, Minitab, and Excel
Fabrication: Autodesk Fusion 360 (CAD/CAM), CNC milling (2.5 & 3-axis), manual milling (w/ rotary vice), MIG/TIG/Stick welding, equipment installation & calibration, small engine repair, and machine maintenance.
Certifications: OSHA 10, WFR, First Aid, CPR, Epinephrine (2025), Lifeguard (2022)

title: Tyler Celotta
text:
Achievements

Eagle Scout, Boy Scouts of America (2023)
Recognized for analytical clarity and team methodology in MathWorks Math Modeling (M3) Challenge (2023)
Awarded SIA (summer internship award), which offers funding to support unpaid off-campus internship opportunities in the public sector and non-profits.

title: Tyler Celotta
text:
Interests
Community service (Boy Scouts of America, Eagle Scout), Photography, Mechanical Design and Fabrication, Public awareness campaigns (Arrive Alive Program & Save The Boundary Waters)
